title: Compute the Elapsed Time Correctly
prompt: This program is supposed to print how many milliseconds elapsed between two fixed struct timespec values (start = 10.5s, end = 12.1s - 1600ms apart). It only subtracts tv_nsec directly, which goes negative here and gives the wrong answer. Fix the formula so it correctly combines the whole-second and nanosecond differences, and prints exactly "Elapsed: 1600 ms".
